prompt: [Character] Fully refer to the face and hair of the character in the reference image I uploaded. Cinematic ultra-photorealistic extreme close-up portrait photography, with an 18-22 year old adult male/female as the main subject. The gender can be replaced as needed, or a character reference image can be uploaded to maintain consistency in facial features, hairstyle, and identity. Maintain the character's original facial recognizability while presenting a more natural, gentle, and approachable state. The character's temperament is quiet, confident, and natural, not deliberately posed, like a moment captured in real photography. [Expression] The character shows a very playful smile, corners of the mouth turned up, with real laughter in the eyes, facial muscles naturally relaxed, and slight natural changes in the apple muscles. The smile is warm and healing. [Composition] The image shows only about half of the face, with one eye as the sole visual focus. The character stares directly at the camera. The composition is bold, with strong visual pressure and artistic tension. [Skin Texture] Real and natural skin texture, completely preserving pores, fine vellus hair, subtle skin tone fluctuations, slight freckles, local redness, small acne marks, shallow textures, and other real skin characteristics. No skin smoothing or beautification treatments. The skin has natural oily highlights and real subcutaneous texture. [Eye Details] Exquisite and natural eye makeup, clean and smooth eyeliner, soft eyeshadow layers without excessive exaggeration; the iris presents a complex radial fiber structure, the pupil edges are sharp and clear, the cornea has real wet reflections, and highlights comply with physical optical laws; eyelashes vary in thickness and are naturally arranged; eyebrows are thick and grow in a specific direction, retaining a small amount of messy hair; the nose wings, lips, and facial edges have real skin textures, and the lip lines are delicate and natural. [Hair] Hair strands are real and natural, including fine strands, fluff, and slight flyaways. The character's facial structure conforms to real human anatomical proportions, with no AI deformities, no over-editing, no plastic skin, and no wax figure texture. [Lighting] Uses soft cinematic rim lighting combined with weak contour light to shape three-dimensional facial layers. Dark areas retain rich details, with natural light and dark transitions. The lighting is soft and full of atmosphere, without harsh shadows or HDR effects. [Background] The background is completely blurred, retaining only soft color blocks and environmental atmosphere. An extremely shallow depth of field highlights the eye focus. The overall aesthetic has high-end editorial magazine, documentary portrait, and museum-grade art photography qualities. [Camera Specifications] Real photography style, RAW original photo texture, 85mm Macro lens, full-frame camera, f/2 large aperture, ultra-high resolution, real color science, high dynamic range, delicate micro-contrast, cinematic film colors, slight film grain, without any beauty filter processing. [Style] Award-winning editorial portrait, museum-quality fine art portrait, documentary realism, ultra photorealistic, cinematic portrait photography, physically accurate lighting, razor-sharp eye focus, authentic skin texture, natural imperfections preserved, realistic anatomy, high fidelity facial details, premium fashion editorial, masterpiece.

promptZh: [角色] 完全参考我上传的参考图中的人物面部和发型。电影级超写实极致特写肖像摄影，主体为 18-22 岁的成年男性/女性。性别可根据需要替换，或上传角色参考图以保持面部特征、发型和身份的一致性。在保持角色原有面部辨识度的同时，呈现出更自然、温柔且平易近人的状态。角色气质安静、自信且自然，非刻意摆拍，如同真实摄影捕捉到的瞬间。[表情] 角色展现出非常俏皮的微笑，嘴角上扬，眼中带着真实的笑意，面部肌肉自然放松，苹果肌有细微的自然变化。笑容温暖且治愈。[构图] 画面仅展示约半张脸，以一只眼睛作为唯一的视觉焦点。角色直视镜头。构图大胆，具有强烈的视觉冲击力和艺术张力。[皮肤纹理] 真实自然的皮肤纹理，完全保留毛孔、细微绒毛、微妙的肤色起伏、轻微雀斑、局部泛红、小痘印、浅层纹理等真实皮肤特征。不进行任何磨皮或美颜处理。皮肤具有自然的油光和真实的皮下质感。[眼部细节] 精致自然的眼妆，干净流畅的眼线，柔和的眼影层次，不夸张；虹膜呈现复杂的放射状纤维结构，瞳孔边缘锐利清晰，角膜有真实的湿润反光，高光符合物理光学定律；睫毛粗细不一，排列自然；眉毛浓密且有特定的生长方向，保留少量杂毛；鼻翼、嘴唇和面部边缘具有真实的皮肤质感，唇纹细腻自然。[头发] 发丝真实自然，包含细发、绒毛和轻微的碎发。角色面部结构符合真实人体解剖比例，无 AI 畸变，无过度编辑，无塑料感皮肤，无蜡像质感。[光影] 使用柔和的电影级轮廓光结合微弱的侧光，塑造立体的面部层次。暗部保留丰富细节，明暗过渡自然。光线柔和且充满氛围感，无生硬阴影或 HDR 效果。[背景] 背景完全虚化，仅保留柔和的色块和环境氛围。极浅的景深突出了眼部焦点。整体美学具有高端杂志编辑、纪实肖像和博物馆级艺术摄影的品质。[相机规格] 真实摄影风格，RAW 原片质感，85mm 微距镜头，全画幅相机，f/2 大光圈，超高分辨率，真实色彩科学，高动态范围，细腻的微对比度，电影胶片色彩，轻微胶片颗粒感，无任何美颜滤镜处理。[风格] 获奖编辑肖像，博物馆级艺术肖像，纪实写实主义，超写实，电影级肖像摄影，物理精确光影，锐利的眼部对焦，真实的皮肤纹理，保留自然瑕疵，真实的解剖结构，高保真面部细节，高级时尚编辑，杰作。
